overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an industrial power plant complex in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves along a deserted asphalt road past massive cooling towers and red-striped chimneys, with a flying vehicle passing overhead, before turning right at an intersection to proceed along a graffiti-covered warehouse wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road approaching power plant cooling towers

events.description: flying vehicle (AV) enters from left and passes overhead moving right
flying vehicle exits frame to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the deserted industrial road toward the massive cooling towers

notable_agents.action: flying AV passing from left to right above the road at moderate altitude

entered.detail: massive concrete cooling tower with hexagonal pattern emitting white steam
tall red and white striped industrial chimneys in the background
large metal pipelines running parallel to the road
abandoned red sedan with open doors on the roadside
tall industrial light poles with orange glowing fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial road flanked by massive infrastructure. The camera moves forward toward a huge cooling tower on the left and striped chimneys ahead. A flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right around the 8-second mark. The player passes a wrecked red car on the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with neon signage and debris piles

events.description: red neon sign 'Bloody Hell' becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past street lights and approaching the intersection at the end of the road

entered.detail: red neon sign with cursive text mounted on the industrial building
low concrete divider separating the road from the pipe structures
scattered cardboard, tires, and trash accumulated on the road surface

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the industrial road, the cooling tower looms larger on the left. A red neon sign reading 'Bloody Hell' becomes visible on a building around 22 seconds. The road is littered with debris and cardboard. The camera approaches an intersection at the end of the straightaway, with concrete barriers lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: side road along warehouse wall with graffiti

events.description: camera turns right at the intersection to follow the side road along the building

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and proceeding along the side of the industrial building

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including 'DIE' repeated in red
narrow asphalt road running perpendicular to the main industrial complex

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the camera turns right onto a narrower side road. The massive industrial building now runs along the left side, covered in graffiti. The cooling tower and neon sign fall behind as the camera proceeds along the warehouse wall, revealing more industrial infrastructure and tagged concrete surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate industrial road that transitions from a wide vista of massive infrastructure into a narrow, graffiti-lined corridor. It begins by moving forward past a towering cooling tower and striped chimneys, while a flying vehicle streaks across the sky and a wrecked red car sits abandoned on the roadside. As the camera proceeds, the environment becomes more cluttered with debris and cardboard, bringing a red neon sign reading Bloody Hell into view. The scene then reaches an intersection lined with concrete barriers, where the camera turns right to leave the open road behind. Finally, the perspective shifts to a narrower side path, gliding alongside a massive warehouse wall covered in graffiti and tagged concrete surfaces.
